description:
Add a manual server action "Send SMS Follow-up Email Blast" to the
hr.applicant Action menu. When triggered, it emails every applicant
currently in the SMS follow-up queue — the same three populations that
the existing daily sms_queue_digest cron surfaces for HR to SMS by hand
(Qualification info-survey pending, Stage 1 resume missing, Stage 7
assessment pending). The email content mirrors the SMS wording so HR
has a quick way to fire the email side of the follow-up without doing
the SMS pass first.

Defensive: the action introspects custom fields at runtime, so it is
safe to deploy before the v5 reminder-field blocks land — sections
whose driving field is missing are simply skipped (zero emails for
that section, no error). Once all v5 blocks are in place on the same
environment, all three sections fire.

Does not stamp any x_studio_sms_*_date fields — SMS remains a separate
channel HR can still send manually.
